basic_details.job_title: ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 14 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 06 July 2026 on the official website esic.gov.in/. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PH as per rules

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree or PG Diploma in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council, MBBS with at least 2 years working experience (1 year in concerned specialty) from government/private hospital if no PG qualified candidates
qualification.details: Senior Resident (Orthopedics): PG Degree or PG Diploma holders in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council. In the absence of PG qualified doctors, MBBS graduates who possess at least 2 years working experience out of which 1 year of experience in the concerned specialty from government hospital/private hospital (not a private clinic) will be considered for selection. However, Preference will be given to PG qualified candidates. Senior Resident (ENT): PG Degree or PG Diploma holders in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council. In the absence of PG qualified doctors, MBBS graduates who possess at least 2 years working experience out of which 1 year of experience in the concerned specialty from government hospital/private hospital (not a private clinic) will be considered for selection. However, Preference will be given to PG qualified candidates. Senior Resident (Pediatric): PG Degree or PG Diploma holders in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council. In the absence of PG qualified doctors, MBBS graduates who possess at least 2 years working experience out of which 1 year of experience in the concerned specialty from government hospital/private hospital (not a private clinic) will be considered for selection. However, Preference will be given to PG qualified candidates. Senior Resident (Surgery): PG Degree or PG Diploma holders in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council. In the absence of PG qualified doctors, MBBS graduates who possess at least 2 years working experience out of which 1 year of experience in the concerned specialty from government hospital/private hospital (not a private clinic) will be considered for selection. However, Preference will be given to PG qualified candidates. Senior Resident (OBG): PG Degree or PG Diploma holders in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council. In the absence of PG qualified doctors, MBBS graduates who possess at least 2 years working experience out of which 1 year of experience in the concerned specialty from government hospital/private hospital (not a private clinic) will be considered for selection. However, Preference will be given to PG qualified candidates. Senior Resident (Accident & Emergency): PG Degree or PG Diploma holders in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council. In the absence of PG qualified doctors, MBBS graduates who possess at least 2 years working experience out of which 1 year of experience in the concerned specialty from government hospital/private hospital (not a private clinic) will be considered for selection. However, Preference will be given to PG qualified candidates. Senior Resident (General Medicine): PG Degree or PG Diploma holders in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council. In the absence of PG qualified doctors, MBBS graduates who possess at least 2 years working experience out of which 1 year of experience in the concerned specialty from government hospital/private hospital (not a private clinic) will be considered for selection. However, Preference will be given to PG qualified candidates.

rows.employees_state_insurance_corporation_es: PG Degree or PG Diploma in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council, MBBS with at least 2 years working experience (1 year in concerned specialty) from government/private hospital if no PG qualified candidates

content_sections.heading: ESIC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ESIC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ESIC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Senior Resident (Orthopedics): PG Degree or PG Diploma holders in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council. In the absence of PG qualified doctors, MBBS graduates who possess at least 2 years working experience out of which 1 year of experience in the concerned specialty from government hospital/private hospital (not a private clinic) will be considered for selection. However, Preference will be given to PG qualified candidates. Senior Resident (ENT): PG Degree or PG Diploma holders in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council. In the absence of PG qualified doctors, MBBS graduates who possess at least 2 years working experience out of which 1 year of experience in the concerned specialty from government hospital/private hospital (not a private clinic) will be considered for selection. However, Preference will be given to PG qualified candidates. Senior Resident (Pediatric): PG Degree or PG Diploma holders in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council. In the absence of PG qualified doctors, MBBS graduates who possess at least 2 years working experience out of which 1 year of experience in the concerned specialty from government hospital/private hospital (not a private clinic) will be considered for selection. However, Preference will be given to PG qualified candidates. Senior Resident (Surgery): PG Degree or PG Diploma holders in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council. In the absence of PG qualified doctors, MBBS graduates who possess at least 2 years working experience out of which 1 year of experience in the concerned specialty from government hospital/private hospital (not a private clinic) will be considered for selection. However, Preference will be given to PG qualified candidates. Senior Resident (OBG): PG Degree or PG Diploma holders in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council. In the absence of PG qualified doctors, MBBS graduates who possess at least 2 years working experience out of which 1 year of experience in the concerned specialty from government hospital/private hospital (not a private clinic) will be considered for selection. However, Preference will be given to PG qualified candidates. Senior Resident (Accident & Emergency): PG Degree or PG Diploma holders in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council. In the absence of PG qualified doctors, MBBS graduates who possess at least 2 years working experience out of which 1 year of experience in the concerned specialty from government hospital/private hospital (not a private clinic) will be considered for selection. However, Preference will be given to PG qualified candidates. Senior Resident (General Medicine): PG Degree or PG Diploma holders in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council. In the absence of PG qualified doctors, MBBS graduates who possess at least 2 years working experience out of which 1 year of experience in the concerned specialty from government hospital/private

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PH as per rules

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Senior Resident posts at ESIC?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies announced for the Senior Resident posts by the Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC).

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this ESIC recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PG Degree or PG Diploma in the concerned specialty and be registered with the Medical Council. MBBS graduates with at least 2 years of working experience (1 year in the concerned specialty) are also eligible if PG qualified candidates are unavailable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Resident posts is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PH candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Resident posts will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 135129 per month.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the ESIC Senior Resident posts is scheduled to be held on 17th July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at ESIC, Vapi, Gujarat, with the pincode 396195.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Senior Resident positions is contractual.
